EmailTemplate.name: AES - Rejected Periodic Document
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Alliance Nursing - Email Template
REJECTED DOCUMENT.
Hi {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Contact__c},
The {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Document__c} document has been rejected due to the following reason: {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.Rejection_Reason__c}. {!Rejection_Notes__c} Please follow the link below to update the document to ensure we can provide you with future work opportunities. The {!b3o__Document_Submission__c.b3o__Document__c} document is marked with a red dot on the list.
UPDATE MY DOCUMENTATION
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
